title: [PatPat] Pyatochka.patpat
description: This resource pack replaces the default patpat hand with the heel
body:
[PatPat Mod](https://modrinth.com/plugin/patpat)

This simple resource pack replaces the default PatPat hand with the heel.![patpat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad3fe1538ad4c24f4f575625af4687dd8d4f2f2b.png)
